role: Central template assets for the ArchSpine mirror system, providing reusable foundational documentation, prompt engineering components, configuration standards, and public API surface documentation.
responsibility: Collectively, these templates establish the architectural documentation, LLM prompt generation toolkit, code quality and naming rules, and external interface overview that support consistent development, maintenance, and operation of the ArchSpine mirror system.

children.role: Defines the foundational documentation for the ArchSpine mirror system, encompassing its architecture, configuration, component interfaces, and operational guidelines.
This directory provides the prompt engineering toolkit for ArchSpine, including templates, rendering blocks, examples, and schemas used to generate structured semantic summaries via LLM.
Central directory for ArchSpine project configuration standards, including layered architecture constraints and naming conventions.
This directory contains the public API surface documentation and risk hotspot analysis for the ArchSpine mirror system.
